overall.description: First-person perspective inside a futuristic cyberpunk train car from a video game. The camera moves slowly through the dimly lit interior with green neon lighting, passing standing and seated passengers while the train travels through a dark urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic train car with standing passengers

agents.ego_description: standing in the moving train car, facing forward toward standing passengers holding support poles

notable_agents.action: standing passenger gripping a yellow support pole, wearing a dark leather jacket
seated passenger with white hair looking down at a handheld device

entered.detail: long fluorescent light fixtures running along the ceiling with greenish-yellow glow
yellow vertical poles for standing passengers to grip
large windows showing dark exterior with passing lights and reflections
illuminated sign showing route number 22 in blue digits
discarded beverage cans and bottles on a metal ledge
brown upholstered bench seats along the left wall with passengers sitting

segments.scene_description: The scene opens inside a dimly lit cyberpunk train car with green neon lighting. The camera faces forward toward standing passengers holding yellow support poles, while bench seating is visible in the background on the left. Through the right-side windows, the dark night landscape passes by with occasional lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: train car seating area with advertisements

events.description: camera pans left to focus on the left side bench seating and wall advertisements

agents.ego_description: moving through the train car while panning left to observe seated passengers on the left side

notable_agents.action: seated passenger wearing a blue cap and dark jacket, looking forward stoically
seated passenger in green shirt and red cap, looking down at their lap

entered.detail: illuminated commercial signs and posters on the left wall including a red and white sign

segments.scene_description: As the camera pans left, the focus shifts to the left side of the train car where passengers sit on brown benches. Wall advertisements become visible above the seating area, illuminated by the green neon ceiling lights. The right-side windows recede into the background as the camera focuses on the seated passengers and interior details.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dimly lit cyberpunk train car that shifts from a forward-facing view of the aisle to a detailed look at the passenger seating. It begins facing forward, gliding past standing passengers who grip yellow support poles while the dark night landscape streaks past the right-side windows. As the camera pans left, the focus shifts away from the passing exterior and toward the interior's brown bench seating. The scene then expands to reveal illuminated wall advertisements above the passengers, all bathed in the glow of green neon ceiling lights.
